title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: R package artfishr implements tools producing catch effort estimates sample-based survey data small-scales fisheries data following FAO Artfish extrapolation methodology. ensure consistency interoperability, input datasets must comply standardized formats validation rules. vignette describes: required data formats used artfishr, sample data format specifications provided package, generate empty templates input data, validate input data. Four core datasets supported: Active vessels: Number active vessels per stratum (vessels can potentially go fishing) Effort (two variants depending data collection method): fisher interview boat counting Active days: number days month fishing activity Landings: landings survey observation data

title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: dataset type follows standardized structure defined JSON specification file. schemas describe column names, units, validation rules. example file can accessed directly via system.file(): Preview structure: template first tab describes fields precise mandatory structure.

title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: (Text improve including effort type cases active_days need ) Effort data can collected two distinct monitoring approaches: Data obtained directly fishers questionnaires template x required (number days fished within period reference) case, active days survey necessary. Total number days month used default. Data collected via registers direct observation Template y required (number boats comparison total potentially active boat) number active days month must provided. can come active days survey estimation based fisheries knowledge. formats supported artfishr can validated using validation interface.

title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: artfishr allows users programmatically generate empty templates dataset, based JSON specification. package provide generic method create_artfish_template() generate template using name describe 1. can also export template use argument save_as: use dedicated function dataset :

title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: artfishr includes validation utilities ensure datasets comply expected structure logical rules. Currently, global validator provided: function: - checks required fields dataset flags missing unexpected columns, - ensures consistency content, - ensures consistency . Example: function returns structured report validation results messages. artfishr include also specific validators allow running checks per dataset type.
code: validate_input_datasets(   active_vessels,   effort,   effort_source = c("fisher_interview", "boat_counting"),   active_days = NULL,   landings ) # Load sample datasets active_vessels <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/active_vessels.csv", package = "artfishr")) effort <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/effort.csv", package = "artfishr")) landings <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/landings.csv", package = "artfishr"))  # Validate all datasets validate_input_datasets(   active_vessels = active_vessels,   effort = effort,   effort_source = "fisher_interview",   landings = landings ) # Load sample datasets active_vessels <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/active_vessels.csv", package = "artfishr")) effort <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/effort.csv", package = "artfishr")) landings <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/landings.csv", package = "artfishr")) active_days <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/active_days.csv", package = "artfishr"))  validate_active_vessels_template(active_vessels) validate_effort_template(effort,effort_source ="boat_counting") # or "fisher_interview" validate_landings_template(landings) validate_active_days_template(active_days)

title: Data Requirements and Validation
text: Use provided JSON specs templates ensure data consistency. Always validate datasets running analyses. Choose appropriate effort format according monitoring method. Keep datasets synchronized mandatory fields (e.g., year, fishing unit, landing site). Extend customize validation rules necessary national contexts.

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: vignette demonstrates apply ARTFISH methodology estimating fisheries catch effort, related indicators using artfishr R package. methodology aims extrapolate sample-based data produce total estimates stratum sample. vignette walks computation step shows use unified workflow function artfish_compute_report(), automates full estimation process.

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: package includes example datasets stored inst/extdata/samples/. Let’s load using system.file(): Following data required produce estimates: - Active vessels: number active vessels per stratum (per landing site) - Active days: number days moth recording fishing actity - Effort survey data: fisher interviews boat counting - Landings data: catch per species observed fishing trip information data structure, refer example data validation requirements.
code: active_vessels <- readr::read_csv(   system.file("extdata/samples", "active_vessels.csv", package = "artfishr") ) #> Rows: 12 Columns: 6 #> ── Column specification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Delimiter: "," #> chr (1): fishing_unit #> dbl (5): year, month, minor_stratum, landing_site, fleet_engagement_number #>  #> ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. #> ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.  effort <- readr::read_csv(   system.file("extdata/samples", "effort.csv", package = "artfishr") ) #> Rows: 164 Columns: 9 #> ── Column specification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Delimiter: "," #> chr (2): fishing_unit, effort_fishing_duration_unit #> dbl (7): year, month, day, minor_stratum, landing_site, effort_fishing_durat... #>  #> ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. #> ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.  active_days <- readr::read_csv(   system.file("extdata/samples", "active_days.csv", package = "artfishr") ) #> Rows: 12 Columns: 6 #> ── Column specification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Delimiter: "," #> chr (1): fishing_unit #> dbl (5): year, month, minor_stratum, landing_site, effort_fishable_duration #>  #> ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. #> ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.  landings <- readr::read_csv(   system.file("extdata/samples", "landings.csv", package = "artfishr") ) #> Rows: 570 Columns: 15 #> ── Column specification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Delimiter: "," #> chr (6): fishing_trip, fishing_unit, effort_fishing_duration_unit, species, ... #> dbl (9): year, month, day, minor_stratum, landing_site, effort_fishing_durat... #>  #> ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. #> ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: Effort estimate calculation based 3 components active vessel, active days activity coefficient. Effort = Active vessels x Active days X Activity coefficient
code: effort_estimate <- artfishr::compute_effort_estimate(   active_vessels = active_vessels,   active_vessels_strategy = "latest",   landings = landings,   effort = effort,   effort_source = "fisher_interview",   active_days = active_days,   minor_strata = "minor_stratum" ) #> [1] "2025-01-01"

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: CPUE calculated landing survey data. stratum, overall average CPUE calculated.

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: Catch estimate calculation based formula: Catch = CPUE x Effort.
code: catch_estimate <- artfishr::compute_catch_estimate(   effort_estimate,   landings = landings,   minor_strata = "minor_stratum" )

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: individual steps integrated single convenience function:artfish_compute_report(). function executes complete workflow, returning structured report includes intermediate final results.
code: report <- artfishr::compute_report(   active_vessels = active_vessels,   effort = effort,   effort_source = "fisher_interview",   active_days = active_days,   active_vessels_strategy = "closest",   landings = landings,   minor_strata = "minor_stratum" ) #> [1] "2025-01-01"  # Inspect report structure str(report, max.level = 1) #> tibble [22 × 36] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: component output can inspected individually:
code: head(report$effort_estimate) #> Warning: Unknown or uninitialised column: `effort_estimate`. #> NULL head(report$catch_estimate_by_species) #> Warning: Unknown or uninitialised column: `catch_estimate_by_species`. #> NULL

title: Using ArtFishR for Small-Scale Fisheries Estimation
text: vignette illustrated: data requirements ARTFISH (active vessels, effort, active days, landings) sequential workflow used compute indicators manually integrated workflow provided artfish_compute_report() convenience production use, users adapt workflow datasets, ensuring data formats comply specifications inst/extdata/format_specs/.

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: vignette presents statistical conceptual framework underpins ARTFISH methodology implemented artfishr package. aim ARTFISH methodology produce catch effort estimates country level. sampled based approach using stratified random sampling. ARTFISH stands Approaches, Rules Techniques Fisheries statistical monitoring. developed standardized tool adaptable fisheries developing countries. design driven need provide users robust, user-friendly error-free approaches achieve implementation cost-effective fishery statistical systems minimal external assistance. implemented describe Constantine Stamatopoulos (Stamatopoulos, 2002) methodology promoted FAO.

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: ARTFISH based concept catch per unit effort CPUE, using following formula: CPUE = Catch/effort <=> Catch = CPUE x Effort : Catch: refers species taken together usually computed within logical context : limited geographical area stratum given reference period (.e. calendar month) specific boat/gear category CPUE (estimated sample, overall catch per fishing unit): overall average deriving sampling expressing much fish (species) caught unit effort. Sampling context estimated catch. Effort (estimated sample): expressed uniformly total number boats.days within logical context used total catch overall CPUE. CPUE effort estimated sample. sources data can vary depending available country type survey implemented. following schema shows calculation sampling time space, others words days sampled landing sites. (find add schema) Figure 1: ARTFISH principles schema

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: ARTFISH, statistics method, estimates produced stratum. results summed calculate total amount higher level (country total catch…). first level stratification corresponds reference period. ARTFISH, data collection generally organised monthly basis. rather using months, fishing seasons may preferable. reference period first stratification level, meaning estimation can done month reference period month. Types stratification can defined data collection program necessary : Major strata: often subdivisions based administrative, geographical temporal criteria, Minor strata: subdivisions major stratum. Fishing units last (minimum) level stratification method: fishing units built describe fisheries sector country. Major strata minor strata necessary can implemented context requires . may also clear logistical criteria supporting choice strata. Estimates population parameters always calculated lowest stratum level. Totals major stratum level simply aggregations estimates counts minor strata involved. sample size stratum can calculated different method using preliminary data. data available, recommended sample: 8 12 days month, least, 30 landings landing survey, least, 70 effort surveys.

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: CPUE calculating data collected landing survey weight (kg lbs) per day. (schéma de la formule) estimated CPUE, following variables must collected: - fishing unit type (defined sampling plan) - total weight catch, species together (detailed species estimation per species) - fishing trip duration (time spent fishing, fishing trip length…) CPUE calculated per stratum (combination reference month/major /minor strata/fishing unit) following formula: (insert formula?) CPUE=∑=1nCatchi∑=1nUnitofEfforti \mathrm{CPUE}=\frac{\sum_{=1}^{n} {Catch}_{}}{\sum_{=1}^{n} {Unit Effort}_{}} : Catchi = total catch ith sampled fishing trip Unit efforti = effort spent fishing ith sampled fishing trip n = number fishing trips sampled specific determining context. ARTFISH, unit effort expressed day: duration fishing trip time spent fishing (depending level detail data collected). formula used ARTFISH : CPUE=∑=1nCatchi∑=1nTripDurationi \mathrm{CPUE}=\frac{\sum_{=1}^{n} {Catch}_{}}{\sum_{=1}^{n} {TripDuration}_{}} Example: Table 1: Example landings survey record CPUE calculation (insert table) CPUE = (165 + 0 + 90)/(2+1+1) = 63,75 kg/day WARNING: Data collectors must record trip zero catch well must considered calculation example, zero catch considered (record data collectors), CPUE calculation becomes: (165+90)/(2+1) = 255/3 = 85 kg/day. result, overall catches overestimated.

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: sampling time space, effort calculation requires 3 components: (insert formula schema) : D: raising time factor expressing total number days fishing activities month. D estimated active days survey. F: raising factor expressing total number fishing units potentially operating fishing sites (overall geographical area stratum). F estimated frame survey registry. AC: activity coefficient. activity fishing units can either estimated boat activity coefficient (BAC, vertical sampling using boat counting) fishing activity coefficient (FAC, horizontal sampling using fisher interviews). estimation expressed : Effort =F x D x BAC Effort = F x D x FAC  BAC FAC expressing probability boat (= fishing unit) active (=fishing) day month. BAC estimated boat activity survey, FAC fisher interview.

what: 4.2 Number of active vessels: Estimation of raising factor expressing total number of active fishing units (F)
title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: F represents number boats active/involved fishing fleet hence potentially capable going fishing day sampling period. estimate F two common methods depending fleet administratively managed: either frame survey boats registered, vessel registry boat must register fisheries maritime administration. sources may considered currently explored household surveys case small-scale fisheries. stratum fishing unit j, F sum number boats fishing unit sites included stratum: Fi,j=∑k=1qxi,j,k \mathrm{F}_{,j}=\sum_{k=1}^{q} {x}_{,j,k} : x(,j,k) number potentially active vessels fishing unit j site k stratum q number sites stratum Fi,j raising factor stratum fishing unit j.

what: 4.3 Number of active days: Estimation of the time raising factor (D)
title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: D time-extrapolation factor specifies total number days assumed normal fishing days survey period. usually formulated first considering total number calendar days reducing according empirically known factors, holidays, weekends, bad weather, etc. number accounts uniformly days normal activity. D estimated specific determining context (reference period/geographical strata/fishing unit combination). estimate D, target population total number days within month. coefficient D can calculated subtracting number non-potentially fishing days total number days month (stratum fishing unit j): D_(,j)=Number day month-Number nonfishing days Example: Table 2: Template example active days survey (insert table) Table 2: strata 1 fishing unit 2: = 31-9=22 several sites stratum, D weighted mean values, weighted number boats fishing unit different sites. Di,j=∑m=1t(Di,j,m*xi,j,m)∑m=1txi,j,m \mathrm{D}_{,j}=\frac{\sum_{m=1}^{t} {(D_{,j,m}*x_{,j,m})}_{}}{\sum_{m=1}^{t} x_{,j,m}} : m number mth sampled site. m goes 1 t t total number sampled sites xi,j,m number active boats site m stratum fishing unit j Di,j,m number active days site m stratum fishing unit j

title: Statistical framework of the ARTFISH methodology
text: Activity coefficient accounts individual variability boat activities determined examining appropriate number boats findings many active given day. activity fishing units can either estimated boat activity coefficient (BAC, vertical sampling) fishing activity coefficient (FAC, horizontal sampling). estimation expressed : Total fishing effort = F x D x BAC Total fishing effort = F x D x FAC effort expressed number boat-day CPUE kg/day. Horizontal sampling used estimate FAC. Vertical sampling used estimate BAC: - Horizontal sampling. easiest way collect information average number fishing days include question landing survey. fishers know many days went previous week, simply asking many days went fishing previous week suffice. called horizontal sampling fishing effort. - Vertical sampling. vertical sampling, separate fishing effort data collection system designed. landing sites, throughout month, daily basis, total number vessels vessels go fishing registered. system slightly complicated little costlier, may needed cases high migration vessels fishing activities influenced lunar cycle, e.g. light fishing sardinellas.

title: Artfish visualisations
text: vignette describes visualisation tools available artfishr package exploring outputs computed Artfish statistical indicator, following ARTFISH methodology. visualisations organised three modules: Total Catch Effort Catch Effort Fishing Unit Catch Effort Species

title: Artfish visualisations
text: Total Catch Effort module provides visualisations key aggregated metrics derived Artfish computations. serves dashboard tracking overall evolution fishing activity time, ability focus specific fishing units. top-left section interface, date range selector allows user define analysis period. top-right section drop-menu select specific fishing units.  default, fishing units selected drop-menu, meaning available data aggregated. isolate specific fishing units detailed analysis, uncheck units wish exclude list.  filters summary indicators displaying total catch effort selected period fishing unit(s).  Five standardized graph boxes displayed summary indicators. box contains chart summarizing one following metrics: Total Catch Estimation Species Composition (Quantity) Total Nominal Effort Number Active Vessels Average CPUE charts shown default module loaded automatically updated new fishing unit different reporting period selected. first chart displays total catch estimation (kg) selected fishing unit(s) selected time period. second chart displays ranking available species selected reporting period fishing unit(s), tooltips providing absolute values relative contribution total.  next row two charts displays total nominal effort (days) number active vessels selected fishing unit(s) selected reporting period.   final chart displays catch per unit effort (kg/day) selected fishing unit(s) selected reporting period.

what: Artfish - Catch and Effort by Fishing Unit
title: Artfish visualisations
text: Catch Effort Fishing Unit module provides dedicated workspace exploring annual Artfish results focus individual fishing units. Similar previous module, date range selector top-left section dashboard used set analysis period. drop-menu top-right section allows user select one fishing units.  filters summary indicators displaying total catch, total effort, number active vessels selected reporting period fishing unit(s).  Seven standardized graph boxes displayed summary indicators. box contains chart summarizing one following metrics: Species Composition (quantity) Fishing Unit Composition (quantity) Total Catch Estimation Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE) Total Nominal Effort Activity Coefficient Number Active Vessels first chart displays ranking available species selected reporting period fishing unit(s). example, three fishing units selected.  second chart ranks fishing units catch quantity selected reporting period, charts containing tooltips provide absolute values relative contribution total.  third chart displays total catch estimation (kg) fishing unit selected reporting period.  fourth chart displays catch per unit effort (CPUE) fishing unit selected reporting period.  fifth chart displays total nominal effort (days) fishing unit selected reporting period.  sixth chart displays activity coefficient fishing unit selected reporting period.  final chart displays number active vessels fishing unit selected reporting period.

what: Artfish - Catch and Effort by Species
title: Artfish visualisations
text: Catch Effort Species module provides species-oriented workspace exploring Artfish results. initial view displays species selector containing available species database.  species selected, rest module becomes visible. Directly species selector date range selector define analysis period. fishing unit drop-menu allows user refine analysis. default, data fishing units displayed, user may also restrict view single fishing unit.  upper right panel contains two charts. left, donut chart displays distribution total catch selected species reporting period across fishing units.  right, ranking chart displays position selected species (orange) relative species, based total catch quantity. Tooltips within chart provide additional insights absolute values relative proportions.  visualisations four indicator boxes summarising key metrics selected species: Total Catch (kilograms default) Average Price (computed value catch) Total Effort Average Species Ratio  indicator boxes, three standardized graph boxes displayed module. box contains chart summarizing one following metrics: Total Catch Estimation Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE) Total Nominal Effort charts displayed module similar described Total Catch Effort module, single species perspective.

Isolate Data Groups: Double-click group name right-hand legend show group temporarily hide others. active group name appear black text, hidden groups turn grey. Exclude Data Groups: Click group name right-hand legend hide plot. Undo Isolation/Exclusion: Click hidden (grey) group name restore plot view. Double-click plot restore original view zoomed .

text: additional set action buttons located top-right corner plot area .  left right, include: Download PNG: Saves snapshot current plot view PNG image. Zoom: Click drag bounding box directly chart zoom specific area. Pan: Click drag slide chart view horizontally vertically. Box Select: Isolate data points drawing rectangular selection box . Click icon deselect. Lasso Select: Isolate data points drawing free-form shape around . Click icon deselect. Zoom : Instantly steps zoom level closer . Zoom : Instantly steps zoom level . Autoscale: Automatically adjusts chart axes fit visible data cleanly. Reset Axes: Resets chart back default, original scale zooming panning. Plotly Link: Opens views chart within Plotly.js (v2.11.1).

title: Introduction to artfishr package
code: # Load sample datasets active_vessels <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/active_vessels.csv", package = "artfishr")) effort <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/effort.csv", package = "artfishr")) landings <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/landings.csv", package = "artfishr")) active_days <- read.csv(system.file("extdata/samples/active_days.csv", package = "artfishr"))  # Validate data  validate_input_datasets(   active_vessels = active_vessels,   effort = effort,   effort_source = "fisher_interview",   landings = landings,   active_days = active_days )  #Run artfish report <- artfishr::compute_report(   active_vessels = active_vessels,   effort = effort,   effort_source = "fisher_interview",   active_days = active_days,   active_vessels_strategy = "closest",   landings = landings,   minor_strata = "minor_stratum" )  #See result head(report)

what: ARTFISH Fishing Unit - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_fishing_unit_server
title: ARTFISH Fishing Unit - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_fishing_unit_server
text: Server-side logic ARTFISH Fishing Unit dashboard. *"Catch effort - Detailed fishing unit"* module provides dedicated workspace exploring key output metrics derived artfish_compute_report, focus one multiple fishing units. enables users analyse evolution fishing activity time, filtering options fishing units time range. module composed : selector panel adjust time range fishing units display set KPIs presenting aggregated metrics selected period Three boxed plots powered fdishinyr::generic_chart allowing users analyse ranked top items : (1) Species composition (quantity) (2) Fishing unit composition (quantity) (3) Fishing unit composition (value) Six boxed plots powered fdishinyr::generic_chart allowing users analyse key Artfish metrics: (1) Total catch estimation (2) Catch per unit effort (CPUE) (3) Total nominal effort (4) Activity coefficient (5) Number active vessels (6) Total value estimation

title: ARTFISH Fishing Unit - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_fishing_unit_server
code: artfish_shiny_fishing_unit_server(   id,   lang = NULL,   estimate,   effort_source,   minor_strata = NULL,   opts = list() )

title: ARTFISH Fishing Unit - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_fishing_unit_server
text: id Character string. Module namespace identifier. lang Optional language parameter. Can either: character string (static language), reactive returning character string (dynamic language) NULL, current global language used. Default NULL estimate reactive data frame aggregating output artfish_compute, enriched human-readable labels. effort_source Reactive haracter string indicating type effort source. Must either "fisher_interview" "boat_counting". minor_strata Reactive haracter string targeting column name considered minor strata. activated opts named list options. now limited : - refresh_ui gives capacity inject refresh UI button (dynamic computation)

what: ARTFISH Report - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_report_server
title: ARTFISH Report - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_report_server
text: Server-side logic ARTFISH Report dashboard. *"Detailed results Artfish computation – stratum"* module provides ergonomic view key intermediate results calculation steps underlying Artfish algorithm given temporal unit. initial view displays selector inviting user choose year. year available, user must first compute least one indicator using artfish_compute_report. Successive dropdown lists allow user select month fishing unit submitting selection. complete report displayed right-hand side. module composed : selector panel choose report display selecting year, month, fishing unit button validate selection set KPIs presenting report status type effort source gauge chart presenting overall accuracy quality indicator ergonomic report view including intermediate steps final indicators estimation : (1) Effort (2) Landings (3) Estimated catch species

Must either "fisher_interview" "boat_counting". minor_strata Character string targeting column name considered minor strata.

what: ARTFISH Species - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_species_server
title: ARTFISH Species - Shiny Server Module — artfish_shiny_species_server
text: Server-side logic ARTFISH Species dashboard. *"Catch effort - Detailed species"* module provides species-oriented workspace exploring key output metrics derived artfish_compute_report, focus individual species caught. initial view displays selector inviting user choose species. dropdown lists species entries available database. Users can analyse evolution fishing activity time, filtering options species, fishing units, time range. module composed : selector panel choose species display selector panel adjust time range fishing units display Two boxed plots powered fdishinyr::generic_chart allowing users analyse, species level: (1) Fishing unit composition (quantity) (2) Target species ranking (quantity) set KPIs presenting aggregated metrics selected period Five boxed plots powered fdishinyr::generic_chart allowing users analyse key Artfish metrics: (1) Total catch estimation (2) Catch per unit effort (CPUE) (3) Total value estimation (4) Average price (5) Total nominal effort

title: Computes CPUE — compute_cpue
text: CPUE (Catch Per Unit Effort) computed landings, ratio nominal landed catches (catch_nominal_landed) effort fishing duration (effort_fishing_duration). computation performed grouped strata compound year, month fishing_unit. strata can extended additional columns minor_strata argument. Since landings give details data landed species, nominal landed catches sum grouped strata fishing trip get total nominal landed catches fishing trip. catch_nominal_landed effort_fishing_duration sum strata CPUE computed ratio sum. Note: Additional checks performed remove data NAs.

title: Computes CPUE — compute_cpue
text: landings landings minor_strata minor_strata. Default NULL

title: Computes CPUE — compute_cpue
text: tibble object giving CPUE strata

title: Computes effort activity coefficient — compute_effort_activity_coefficient
text: activity coefficient computed effort. Depending source effort data, source information used different: - case 'fisher_interview' coefficient activity computed ratio effort_fishing_duration effort_fishing_reference_period. - case 'boat_counting' coefficient activity computed ratio fleet_engagement_number fleet_engagement_max computation performed grouped strata compound minimum year, month fishing_unit. strata can extended adding one columns minor_strata argument. Note: Additional check performed remove data NAs, ensure data consistency

title: Computes nominal effort estimate — compute_effort_estimate
text: Computes nominal effort estimate

title: Computes nominal effort estimate — compute_effort_estimate
code: compute_effort_estimate(   effort,   effort_source = c("fisher_interview", "boat_counting", "household_interview"),   landings,   active_days = NULL,   active_vessels = NULL,   active_vessels_strategy = c("latest", "closest"),   census_typology = NULL,   minor_strata = NULL,   progress_fn = NULL )

title: Computes nominal effort estimate — compute_effort_estimate_with_FAO_Artfish
text: effort estimate computed product fleet_engagement_number (derived active_vessels), effort_fishable_duration (derivated active_days, effort_activity_coefficient computed compute_effort_activity_coefficient function. computation nominal effort estimate done grouped strata compound year, month fishing_unit. strata can extended additional columns minor_strata argument. Active vessels: active_vessels can either time-dependent,ie given year/month, year atemporal, mainly depending frequency vessels census/survey operated country. additional argument called active_vessels_strategy controls select  active_vessels data time, data time-dependent. latest strategy select latest data acquired time, closest select closest data acquired time, data acquired effort data considered. example, vessel census performed five years, data available 2007 2012. Effort data 2011 needs computed. active_vessels data used? case latest strategy, 2011, latest data available 2007, one used. case closest strategy, 2011, used closest vessel data (ie 2012), assuming betters characterizes fleet engagement year considered. Active days: case 'fisher_interview' (source effort data), active_days data ignored, days month used (generated automatically function)

title: Computes nominal effort estimate — compute_effort_estimate_with_FAO_Artfish
code: compute_effort_estimate_with_FAO_Artfish(   effort,   effort_source = c("fisher_interview", "boat_counting"),   landings,   active_days = NULL,   active_vessels,   active_vessels_strategy = c("latest", "closest"),   minor_strata = NULL,   progress_fn = NULL )

title: Computes nominal effort estimate — compute_effort_estimate_with_FAO_Artfish
text: effort effort data effort_source effort_source (register_interview / boat_counting) landings landings active_days active_days. Default NULL (auto-generated) active_vessels active vessels active_vessels_strategy strategy associate active vessels effort based time. Active vessels period match necessarily periods data (effort, landings), can reported either year year/month. parameter let decide methodology used select active vessels based time. can either "latest" (taking latest period), "closest" ie closest active vessels time, data period. case 2 periods /equally closer, latest time data period taken. minor_strata minor_strata. Default NULL progress_fn progress function args (, n, label). Default NULL
